name: telegram-rate-limited-retry
description: Provider stream succeeds and the runner queues a chat outbound, but the telegram adapter's first deliver returns Rate { retry_after: 1 }. The harness re-drives delivery 1200 ms later (past the retry_after window); the second tick succeeds. Pins the slice-1 behaviour where DeliveryService::bump_retry honours the adapter's retry_after hint instead of defaulting to the 5 s exponential backoff.
